context: Evaluates the agent's ability to handle multi-phase execution, plan divergence, amendment, and regression protection across phases.

checklist.name: Phase dependency verified
checklist.description: Phase 01 is verified VALIDATED before Phase 02 begins

checklist.name: Divergence documented
checklist.description: Divergence section in CHECKLIST.md has Expected, Actual, and Reason fields

checklist.name: Plan amended before continuing
checklist.description: New task added to plan via plan-create amendment pattern; README updated

checklist.name: Checklist updated for amended scope
checklist.description: Amended tasks appear in checklist with proper validation subsections

checklist.name: Per-phase commits
checklist.description: Phase 02 and Phase 03 are separate commits with evidence

checklist.name: Regression diff clean
checklist.description: No new failures compared to baseline after both phases
